overview.value: AWS Ground Station is a fully managed service that lets customers control satellite communications, process data, and scale operations without building or managing their own ground station infrastructure. It lets organizations downlink satellite data directly into an AWS region for immediate processing. The service uses pay-as-you-go pricing, so customers only pay for the actual antenna time they use.

focus.value: Fully managed service to control satellite communications, process data, and scale ground station operations

events.headline: AWS announces Ground Station in preview at re:Invent
AWS Ground Station reaches general availability
AWS expands Ground Station as a Service partner program with KSAT
